name: Alexander Kamenetsky
bio: Author of sci-fi psychological thriller fiction. His debut novel The Final Guardian explores AI, control, and the modern soul.

name: B.W. Lacey
bio: Dark romance indie author of the viral Psychotic Devotion Trilogy — cinematic, brutal, and unapologetically raw stories where love bleeds, burns, and sometimes kills.

name: Bethanie Loren
bio: A mood-writer based in Texas with a wide range of romance titles including LGBTQ+ fiction, contemporary romance, and the Sultry Secrets series.

name: E.A. Harper
bio: Author of sinfully addictive dark romance with spice, angst, and emotional damage. Find her books and merch at her official site.

name: K.E. Noel
bio: Contemporary romance author based in rural Alberta, Canada. Creator of the Hearts of New York series — dual POV stories of powerful but secretly vulnerable men who fall hard.

name: L.L. McAlister
bio: Dark romance author with a thing for hearts. Writes spicy romances with raw passion and just enough chaos to make your Kindle overheat.

name: Laetitia Clark
bio: Born and raised in France, Laetitia started writing stories as a little girl. Now a debut author of romantasy sprinkled with true crime — The Book Nook Curse and Santa Promised.

name: Lea Rose
bio: Contemporary romance author based in the UK. Writes steamy stories with strong women, men with filthy mouths, and a guaranteed happy ever after — both slow burn and fast.

name: Lillian Minx Monroe
bio: Author of dark romance and erotic thriller. Her Circle series features secret societies, ritual obsession, and psychological tension.

name: Madeline Fay
bio: Dark romance author based in rural Michigan. Creator of the Dolls & Douchebags series, known for bully romance and multi-love interests.

name: Noelle Rahn-Johnson
bio: Contemporary romance author from Northern Minnesota with eleven books and growing. Writing career started in 2014 spanning MM, MF, and paranormal romance.

name: River Fox
bio: Fantasy and science fiction romance author living on the Isle of Lewis, Scotland. Former member of the armed forces. Creator of the Magic, Monsters & Mates series and Blood on the Asphalt.

name: Sarah Monday
bio: Dr. Sarah Monday is an Air Force veteran, mother of three, and author of the psychological romance series Code of Souls. She holds a Doctorate in International Business.

name: Savena Rachelle
bio: Author of dark romance and slow-burn fiction. Her Caged Dove Duet explores trauma, obsession, and dangerous love.

name: Shelby Gardner
bio: Author of fantasy romance. Her debut Heir of the Emberscale is a dark, character-driven enemies-to-lovers trilogy starter featuring dragon lore and fated mates.

name: Yvonne Hamilton
bio: Author of emotionally charged dark romance and paranormal fantasy. Creator of the Flame Cursed Inheritance Saga and co-author of the Hexed Valentine series with B. Wills.
